mapper.insert: INSERT INTO claude_messages (conv_id, role, text, created_at) VALUES (#{convId}, #{role}, #{text}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO claude_messages (conv_id, role, subtype, text, created_at) VALUES (#{convId}, #{role}, #{subtype}, #{text}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO claude_messages (conv_id, role, subtype, text, created_at, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_create_tokens) VALUES (#{convId}, #{role}, #{subtype}, #{text}, #{createdAt}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{cacheReadTokens}, #{cacheCreateTokens})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0) AS inputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS outputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cacheReadTokens, COALESCE(SUM(cache_create_tokens), 0) AS cacheCreateTokens FROM claude_messages WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
SELECT role, subtype, text FROM claude_messages WHERE conv_id = #{convId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
